languages.text: {n}Чудо, что машинный дух вокса шаттла вообще продолжает нести вахту. Но его голос становится все тише и тише с годами, и разобрать бормотание древнего духа не представляется возможным.{/n}

{n}It is a miracle that the shuttle vox's machine spirit is able to fulfil its duties at all. But the years have seen the voice grow quieter and quieter, and now it is impossible to make out the mutterings of the ancient spirit.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Чудо, что машинный дух вокса шаттла вообще продолжает нести вахту. Но его голос становится все тише и тише с годами, и разобрать бормотание древнего духа не представляется возможным.{/n}

{n}It is a miracle that the shuttle vox's machine spirit is able to fulfil its duties at all. But the years have seen the voice grow quieter and quieter, and now it is impossible to make out the mutterings of the ancient spirit.{/n}

{n}It is a miracle that the shuttle vox's machine spirit is able to fulfil its duties at all. But the years have seen the voice grow quieter and quieter, and now it is impossible to make out the mutterings of the ancient spirit.{/n}

languages.text: {n}シャトルボックスの機械霊が任務を遂行できる奇跡だ。しかし、年月が経つにつれて、その声は弱くなり、今では古代の霊の呟きを聞き取ることができない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a miracle that the shuttle vox's machine spirit is able to fulfil its duties at all. But the years have seen the voice grow quieter and quieter, and now it is impossible to make out the mutterings of the ancient spirit.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mekiğin voksunun makine ruhunun görevlerini yerine getirebiliyor olması bile bir mucize. Ancak yıllar içinde sesi giderek kısılmış, artık kadim ruhun mırıldanmalarını anlamak imkânsız.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a miracle that the shuttle vox's machine spirit is able to fulfil its duties at all. But the years have seen the voice grow quieter and quieter, and now it is impossible to make out the mutterings of the ancient spirit.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mekiğin voksunun makine ruhunun görevlerini yerine getirebiliyor olması bile bir mucize. Ancak yıllar içinde sesi giderek kısılmış, artık kadim ruhun mırıldanmalarını anlamak imkânsız.{/n}

languages.text: {n}穿梭机的音阵机魂竟然仍能履行职能，真是奇迹。但经年累月，它的声音已愈发微弱。如今，这古老机魂的低语已再也无法分辨。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a miracle that the shuttle vox's machine spirit is able to fulfil its duties at all. But the years have seen the voice grow quieter and quieter, and now it is impossible to make out the mutterings of the ancient spirit.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}穿梭机的音阵机魂竟然仍能履行职能，真是奇迹。但经年累月，它的声音已愈发微弱。如今，这古老机魂的低语已再也无法分辨。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es grenzt an ein Wunder, dass der Vox-Maschinengeist des Schiffes seine Pflichten überhaupt erfüllen kann. Aber mit den Jahren wurde die Stimme immer leiser und mittlerweile ist es unmöglich, die Worte des alten Geistes zu verstehen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a miracle that the shuttle vox's machine spirit is able to fulfil its duties at all. But the years have seen the voice grow quieter and quieter, and now it is impossible to make out the mutterings of the ancient spirit.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Es grenzt an ein Wunder, dass der Vox-Maschinengeist des Schiffes seine Pflichten überhaupt erfüllen kann. Aber mit den Jahren wurde die Stimme immer leiser und mittlerweile ist es unmöglich, die Worte des alten Geistes zu verstehen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}C'est un véritable miracle que le vox de l'esprit de la machine de la navette soit encore capable de remplir ses fonctions. Malheureusement, au fil des ans, sa voix s'est faite de plus en plus faible, et il est désormais impossible de comprendre un traître mot de ses murmures.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a miracle that the shuttle vox's machine spirit is able to fulfil its duties at all. But the years have seen the voice grow quieter and quieter, and now it is impossible to make out the mutterings of the ancient spirit.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}C'est un véritable miracle que le vox de l'esprit de la machine de la navette soit encore capable de remplir ses fonctions. Malheureusement, au fil des ans, sa voix s'est faite de plus en plus faible, et il est désormais impossible de comprendre un traître mot de ses murmures.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Es un milagro que el espíritu máquina del voco de la lanzadera pueda cumplir sus funciones, pero el paso de los años ha ido acallando su voz y ahora es imposible descifrar los murmullos del antiguo espíritu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is a miracle that the shuttle vox's machine spirit is able to fulfil its duties at all. But the years have seen the voice grow quieter and quieter, and now it is impossible to make out the mutterings of the ancient spirit.{/n}
